calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of San Luis Obispo Superior Court Interpleader Action (Quaglino)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property; Instructions Concerning Interpretation Of Instrument; And For Recovery Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Jon Vaught for Petitioner.
Sean Nagel for Katelyn Kaney.
Roman Medjanov in propria persona.

The Court noted there is a venue issue and that San Luis Obispo Court will decide who owns the property. Mr. Nagel stated venue should be in San Luis Obispo and that there is a pre-existing case there. Mr. Vaught stated he doesn't understand how venue is at San Luis Obispo, that somebody dropped money off at the court to determine who does it belong to and that venue is in San Francisco because the trust is being administered in San Francisco. The Court asked what paragraph that is located. Mr. Vaught stated he is mistaken, that he left it out, that the Trustee was living in San Francisco, that the trustee works for an internet company and currently working from home in Texas but her residence is in San Francisco. The Court noted San Luis Obispo has this action on interpleader and that action was filed first, this matter will be taken under submission with an inclination to abate. Mr. Medjanov stated that is a good decision to make.

The petition for order confirming trust property, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property; Instructions Concerning Interpretation Of Instrument; And For Recovery Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Continued To Nov-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
